rule.description: Container drift - shell spawned in container

adaptation_note: Alert is rule.id 100001 at T0=2026-04-24T15:02:23Z on container 17bc2dde3fb0. Find co-firing Falco rules on this same container in a 30min window BRACKETING the alert - 15min before T0 through 15min after T0. Exclude the alerting rule itself. We need the bracketed window because if T0 is the first event of a cluster, a backward-only window would miss the rest of the cluster.
reference_query: python3 scripts/tools/wazuh_cli.py query --query 'data.output_fields.container.id:17bc2dde3fb0 AND NOT rule.id:100001' --start 2026-04-24T14:47:23Z --window 30m
